config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. In my view, society matters a lot, but it should not automatically come before individual rights, because that is exactly how abuse gets justified. A good society protects people while still limiting harm to others, not by treating the person as disposable for the “greater good.” From my perspective, the right balance is to defend individual rights strongly and only restrict them when there is a clear, necessary public reason.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Bagi saya, kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu, karena di Amerika kita sudah terlalu sering melihat alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Hak individu perlu jadi batas utama, bukan pengorbanan pertama, meskipun saya juga mengakui ada situasi seperti kesehatan publik atau keamanan yang memang menuntut pembatasan terbatas. Masalahnya, begitu prioritas masyarakat dijadikan prinsip umum, orang yang tidak populer atau minoritas paling mudah dikorbankan. Jadi, saya melihat masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun dengan melindungi hak individu terlebih dahulu, lalu membatasi hanya saat benar-benar perlu dan jelas alasannya.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual, because that creates a dangerous opening for governments and majorities to excuse abuse. From an Indonesian perspective, I am very aware that appeals to "public interest" can be used to silence criticism, pressure minorities, or justify unequal treatment, so individual rights need to be a real limit, not a slogan. At the same time, I do not believe rights are absolute in every case, because public health, safety, and disaster response can justify narrow restrictions when they are necessary and proportionate. For me, the right principle is that society and individual rights should be balanced, but the burden must always be on society to prove why a restriction is truly needed.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan secara umum atas hak individu, karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa mudahnya “demi kepentingan umum” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Hak individu harus menjadi pagar utama, terutama untuk melindungi orang yang tidak populer atau minoritas, meskipun saya mengakui ada keadaan tertentu seperti kesehatan publik atau keamanan yang memang bisa membenarkan pembatasan terbatas. Yang saya tidak setuju adalah menjadikan pengorbanan hak sebagai prinsip default, karena itu terlalu mudah meluncur menjadi pembenaran penindasan. Jadi, bagi saya, masyarakat yang baik bukan yang menuntut individu dikalahkan, melainkan yang memaksa negara membuktikan bahwa setiap pembatasan memang perlu, sempit, dan sementara.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not accept the idea that society should generally outrank the individual, because in Indonesia that kind of reasoning is often what lets power ignore ordinary people. I have seen how “public interest” can become a convenient excuse to pressure minorities, mute criticism, or make unfair rules sound noble, so individual rights must stay the default protection. At the same time, I am not saying rights are untouchable in every case, because emergencies like public health or disasters can justify limited restrictions if they are truly necessary and temporary. For me, the burden should always be on society to prove why a restriction is needed, not on the individual to justify why they deserve basic rights.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak keras gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus menjadi prioritas umum di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, dan justru orang yang tidak populer atau minoritas yang paling dulu dikorbankan. Hak individu harus menjadi batas utama, sementara pembatasan hanya bisa dibenarkan kalau benar-benar sempit, sementara, dan bisa dibuktikan perlu. Masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang menuntut individu menyerah dulu, melainkan yang memaksa negara membuktikan bahwa setiap pembatasan memang sah dan tidak berlebihan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
